contact.description: You can write to us to report bugs, suggest improvements, share your feedback on the game experience, or ask a question.

message.label: Message

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Check our FAQ before writing, your answer might already be there!

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about how the game works, the rules, transfers, and much more.

q1.question: What is Feeder Series Fantasy F2?
q1.answer: Feeder Series Fantasy F2 is a fantasy game based on the Formula 2 championship. You create a team of drivers and constructors, and score points based on real on-track performances.

q2.question: Is the game official?
q2.answer: No. Feeder Series Fantasy F2 is an independent fan-made project, with no affiliation with the FIA, Formula 1, Formula 2, Formula 3 or F1 Academy.

q3.question: Is the game free?
q3.answer: Yes, Feeder Series Fantasy F2 is completely free.

q4.question: Can I start playing if the season has already started?
q4.answer: Yes. You can join the game at any point during the season. If a race weekend is already underway or finished, your team will start scoring points from the next race weekend.

q1.question: How many teams can I create?
q1.answer: One team per league, but you can participate in multiple leagues at the same time.

q2.question: When is my team locked?
q2.answer: Your team is locked at the official start of the race weekend. Once that moment passes, no changes are possible until the next weekend.

q3.question: Can I change my team during the season?
q3.answer: Yes, as long as the selection period for the next weekend is open.

q4.question: What is the captain?
q4.answer: The captain is a driver in your team whose points are doubled (x2). You can change your captain each weekend as long as your team is not locked.

q1.question: Can I change my drivers and constructors?
q1.answer: Yes, you can freely change your lineup (drivers, constructors, captain) between each weekend, as long as the lock period has not started. There is no change limit for now.

q1.question: What is the starting budget?
q1.answer: Each player has an initial budget of 100 million to build their team.

q2.question: How are driver and constructor prices set?
q2.answer: Prices are automatically calculated from real on-track performances.

q3.question: When do prices change?
q3.answer: Prices change after each race weekend.

q4.question: Why do prices change?
q4.answer: Price changes reflect the form of drivers and constructors to encourage dynamic strategy throughout the season.

q5.question: How does my budget evolve?
q5.answer: Your budget automatically adjusts based on the price changes of your drivers and constructors. If their value increases, your budget increases too. If it drops, your budget decreases. No need to sell to recover the gains!

q1.question: How are points awarded?
q1.answer: Points are awarded based on real performances in qualifying, the Sprint Race and the Feature Race. The detailed scoring system is available in the Rules section.

q2.question: When are points updated?
q2.answer: Points are automatically calculated after each official session, once results are validated. A provisional score may be displayed before final validation.

q3.question: What do DNS, DNF and DSQ mean?

q1.question: What happens if a race is cancelled?
q1.answer: No points are awarded for that race.

q2.question: What happens if a race is shortened or interrupted?
q2.answer: Points are awarded only based on results officially validated by Formula 2.

q3.question: What happens if a driver is replaced?
q3.answer: Feature planned. The handling of replaced drivers will be automatic and fair, so that players are not penalised by changes beyond their control.

q1.question: What is a league?
q1.answer: A league is a group of players competing in a shared leaderboard.

q2.question: Can I join multiple leagues?
q2.answer: Yes. The same fantasy team can participate in multiple leagues at the same time.

q3.question: How are ties broken in the rankings?
q3.intro: In case of a points tie:

q1.question: Can results be changed after the fact?
q1.answer: No. There are no retroactive changes to results or points.

q2.question: Why do my points seem incorrect?
q2.answer: Check the scoring system on the Rules page. If you still have doubts, contact support via the Contact page.

q3.question: How do I contact the game team?

help.title: Need help?
help.description: Can't find your answer? Feel free to contact us.

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.description: Welcome to Feeder Series Fantasy F2. Experience every Formula 2 weekend as a team manager. Pick your drivers, select your constructors, stay within budget, and compete against other players based on real race results.

step1.title: Build your team
step1.description: Put together your lineup while respecting budget constraints

teamName.label: Team name
teamName.description: Choose a unique name that represents you.

constructors.label: 2 constructors
constructors.description: Select two constructors for your team.

drivers.label: 5 drivers
drivers.description: Build your lineup with five drivers of your choice.

captain.label: 1 captain (x2 points)
captain.description: Designate a captain from your drivers: their points will be doubled!

budget.label: Stay within budget
budget.description: Optimise your lineup within the allocated budget.

tip.title: Strategic tip
tip.description: Consistency often pays off better than big names. A consistent driver can score more points than a promising but inconsistent one.

step2.title: Join or create a league
step2.description: Compete against your friends or take on the whole world.

privateLeague.label: Private league
privateLeague.description: Join an existing league with an invitation code.

createLeague.label: Create a league
createLeague.description: Start your own competition and invite your friends to challenge you.

worldRanking.label: World ranking
worldRanking.description: Automatically compare yourself to the best players in the world.

step3.title: Follow the races
step3.description: Your points update automatically after each session

automaticPoints.label: Automatic points
automaticPoints.description: Points are calculated from official results at the end of the weekend.

automaticCalc.label: Automatic calculation
automaticCalc.description: Points are calculated automatically after each weekend and prices evolve based on performances.

step4.title: Analyse and optimise
step4.description: Use statistics to refine your strategy

recentForm.label: Recent form
recentForm.description: Study driver and constructor performances over the last few races.

circuitPerf.label: Circuit performance
circuitPerf.description: Some drivers excel on specific tracks.

priceEvolution.label: Price evolution
priceEvolution.description: Driver prices rise or fall based on their performances. Your budget adjusts automatically.

step5.title: Win the season
step5.description: Accumulate points and dominate your leaderboard

leagueWin.label: League victory
leagueWin.description: The highest score in your league wins the private championship.

worldChamp.label: World champion
worldChamp.description: The highest overall score becomes FSF Series 2/Tier 2 season champion.

important.title: Important to know
important.note1: Driver and constructor prices change after each weekend.
important.note2: Once your team is locked, you can no longer modify it for the weekend.
important.note3: Points are calculated based on official results published by the FIA.

ready.title: Ready to start?
ready.description: All clear? Jump in and build the team that will dominate the season.

myLeagues.title: My Leagues
myLeagues.description: Create a private league or join your friends with an invitation code.

createModal.title: Create a league
createModal.description: Give your league a name to get started.

myTeam.title: My team
myTeam.noTeamHint: Set a name by going to

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to manage your team.

deadline.locked: 🔒 Team locked for the weekend of

namePopup.title: Name your team!
namePopup.description: Choose a unique name for this league
namePopup.info: You can change this name at any time from

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information and security

logout.title: Sign out
logout.description: Sign out of your account on this device.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Deleting your account is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be lost.

confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
confirm.description: This action is irreversible. Your account and all your data will be permanently deleted.

hero.title: Hall of
hero.description: The top 50 strategists of Feeder Series Fantasy F2. Only the most talented make it into this elite ranking.

podium.buildingDescription: At least 3 ranked players are needed to display the podium

myPosition.title: My Position
myPosition.top50: 🎉 Congratulations! You're in the Top 50 worldwide
myPosition.keepGoing: Keep improving to reach the Top 50!

infoCard.title: About the ranking
infoCard.info1: Only the top 50 players worldwide are displayed
infoCard.info2: The ranking is updated after each race weekend
infoCard.info3: Points accumulate throughout the entire season

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Join the grid and start your team.

hero.title: Rules
hero.description: Discover the full rules: team composition, budget, points system, rankings and edge cases. Everything you need to know to play by the rules.

constructors.label: 2 constructors
constructors.description: Each team must select exactly two constructors.

drivers.label: 5 drivers
drivers.description: Build your lineup with five drivers of your choice.

captain.label: 1 captain
captain.description: Designate a captain from your 5 drivers: all their points will be doubled (x2)!

budget.label: Fixed budget
budget.description: Stay within the budget limit for your entire lineup.

oneTeam.label: One team per user
oneTeam.description: Each account can only manage one team per league.

prices.label: Driver and constructor prices
prices.description: Each driver and constructor has a price that changes dynamically.

evolution.label: Changes after each weekend
evolution.description: Prices are automatically adjusted based on real performances from the previous weekend.

locked.label: Locked team
locked.description: Once your team is validated and the race weekend begins, driver and constructor prices are frozen. They only change after the full weekend.

tip.title: Market strategy
tip.description: Anticipate price rises and drops. A high-performing driver will see their price increase, while a struggling driver will become more affordable.

s3.title: Driver points

driverSum.label: Sum of both drivers
driverSum.description: Drivers score the total points earned in each session (qualifying, sprint race and feature race).

s3.pitlane: * Cars starting from the pit lane will be considered as having started from a position relative to the last car on the grid.
s3.dnfNote: ** DNF = Did Not Finish; DNS = Did Not Start; DSQ = Disqualified

constructorSum.label: Sum of both drivers
constructorSum.description: Constructors score the combined total of their two official drivers for each session (qualifying, sprint, feature race).

captainBonus.title: Captain Bonus
captainBonus.description: The designated captain scores double their points. Choose wisely!

weekend.label: Weekend ranking
weekend.description: Points accumulated across the three sessions (qualifying, sprint, feature) of the current weekend.

league.label: League ranking
league.description: Sum of all points scored during the season in your private league.

world.label: World ranking
world.description: Global ranking of all FSF players across all leagues.

cancelled.label: Cancelled race
cancelled.description: If a session is cancelled, no points are awarded for that session.

teamChange.label: Constructor change mid-season
teamChange.description: If a driver changes constructor during the season, the system automatically updates their affiliation.

finalDecision.label: Final decision
finalDecision.description: In the event of an exceptional or unforeseen situation, the game's scoring system takes precedence.

summary.title: In summary
summary.description: The points system rewards the real performances of your drivers and constructors. Qualifying, sprint races and feature races all count. Manage your budget, anticipate price changes, and build a balanced team to dominate your leaderboard throughout the season.

mobileWarning.title: ⚠️ PC use recommended
mobileWarning.description: is optimised for a PC experience. The interface is currently
mobileWarning.descriptionEnd: and will be difficult to use on a smartphone.
mobileWarning.mobileUpdate: A mobile version is planned in upcoming updates! 📱

hero.title: Feeder Series
hero.description: Build your ultimate team, line up the best drivers and constructors, and dominate the world rankings in the most immersive F2 fantasy game.

pitch.title: Your ultimate team at your fingertips
pitch.description: Experience every Formula 2 weekend as a team manager. Pick your drivers, select your constructors and compete against other players based on real race performances.

roadmap.title: Even more features coming soon!
roadmap.description: We're actively working on new features to improve your game experience.

multilang.title: Multilingual version
multilang.desc: Game available in English and other languages

design.title: Improved design
design.desc: Even more modern and intuitive interface

friends.title: Friends system
friends.desc: Add your friends and track each other's performances

roadmap.suggestionText: Feel free to share your suggestions via the

realtime.title: Real-time scores
realtime.desc: Points are automatically calculated after each session (qualifying, sprint, feature race) based on the real performances of your drivers and constructors.

strategy.title: Strategy & budget
strategy.desc: Optimise your lineup with a limited budget. Driver and constructor prices evolve based on their performances. Buy low, sell high!

leagues.title: Private leagues
leagues.desc: Create private leagues to challenge your friends. Share an invitation code and track your performances in a dedicated leaderboard.

world.title: World ranking
world.desc: Compare yourself to the best players in the world in the official FSF ranking. Prove you are the best Formula 2 strategist.

cta.title: Play with your friends
cta.description: Join a private league with an invitation code, and take on your mates every weekend. Play, have fun and beat your friends each race weekend.

warning.title: ⚠️ Irreversible action
warning.line3: All scores and rankings will be erased

footer.disclaimer: Feeder Series Fantasy is an independent fantasy game created by fans. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to the FIA, Formula 1, Formula 2, Formula 3, or F1 Academy.
